steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content: The table gives the point $(0,18)$. In a linear equation $y=mx+b$, the value when $x=0$ is the $y$-intercept, so $b=18$.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
The table also gives the point $(1,13)$. Use $(0,18)$ and $(1,13)$ to find the slope.
$$m=\frac{13-18}{1-0}=-5$$
